arts.ttl: Ten new year resolutions for Carlisle United in 2025
arts.sum: JON COLMAN: Well, it can’t be as bad as last year…can it? Here are ten wishes for a much brighter 2025 at Carlisle United.

arts.ttl: Tranmere boss on aim to 'exploit' Carlisle United in high-pressure game
arts.sum: Tranmere boss Nigel Adkins admits the clash with Carlisle United is a “pressure game” – and wants his side to exploit the Blues’ struggles.

arts.ttl: Tranmere clash as big as it gets, admits Carlisle United boss
arts.sum: Mike Williamson admits Carlisle United’s clash with Tranmere Rovers today is as big as they come.

arts.ttl: In pictures: Carlisle United fans at the Crewe game
arts.sum: GALLERY: An impressive 924-strong travelling support cheered on Carlisle United at Crewe Alexandra in the New Year's Day defeat.

arts.ttl: Tranmere boss under pressure ahead of Carlisle United clash
arts.sum: Tranmere Rovers boss Nigel Adkins is facing calls for his head from fans ahead of the crunch clash with Carlisle United.

arts.ttl: New Carlisle United signing Whelan's goal highlights
arts.sum: As the midfielder becomes Carlisle United's latest signing, here are some recent highlights from Callum Whelan's career.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United seal signing of Gateshead midfielder Whelan
arts.sum: Carlisle United have confirmed the signing of Gateshead midfielder Callum Whelan on a two-and-a-half year deal.

arts.ttl: 'Some variation' - Carlisle United boss on plans for short-term trio
arts.sum: Mike Williamson admits there is “variation” in his intentions regarding Carlisle United’s three players whose deals are almost up.

arts.ttl: Preview: Tranmere Rovers vs. Carlisle United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League Two clash between Tranmere Rovers and Carlisle United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United midfielder Guy set for more 'tests' over illness
arts.sum: Mike Williamson says Callum Guy is set for more medical tests over the illness the Carlisle United midfielder is suffering from.
